name: Abandoned Watchtower
description: A stone tower looms over the highway, its upper floors collapsed and overgrown with ivy. It looks like it hasn't seen use in decades.

discovery.message: Off the main road, you spot the crumbling remains of an old watchtower peeking through the trees.

approach.text: The heavy oak door hangs off its hinges, but the ivy-covered stone walls look climbable. You hear voices from inside.

choices.label: [Athletics 14] Climb the ivy and enter through a second-story window.

entry-front.text: You step through the broken door. Two bandits are huddled around a small fire, and they jump up as you enter!

climb-success.text: You pull yourself up the thick vines and slip through a window. You're on the second floor, looking down at two bandits by a fire. They haven't noticed you.

choices.label: Drop down with a surprise attack.
Quietly loot the chest on this floor first.

surprise-attack.text: You drop down with a roar! The bandits are caught completely off guard.

stairs.text: The stairs to the second floor are rotting and treacherous.
stairs.success_text: You carefully navigate the rotting wooden stairs to the second floor.
stairs.failure_text: A step cracks under your weight! You tumble back down.

watchtower-treasure.text: In a corner of the upper floor, you find a small chest.
